name: cargus-forge
description: Plugins for knowledge management, note-taking workflows, and Claude Code productivity.

plugins.name: obsidian
plugins.description: Daily notes, meeting processing, task management, and note creation for Obsidian vaults.

plugins.name: knowledge-system
plugins.description: Bootstrap a three-tier knowledge system (CLAUDE.md, rules, skills) for any project.

plugins.name: codex-review
plugins.description: Iteratively refine a plan document by looping with the Codex CLI until it has no blocking feedback left.

plugins.name: adr-management
plugins.description: Create and maintain Architecture Decision Records (ADRs) as living documents, with a litmus test for what earns a record.
